CONTENT.Club career: On 23 July 2018, Laurienté signed his first professional contract with Rennes and immediately went on loan to Orléans in Ligue 2. He made his professional debut with the club in a 2–0 league loss to Lens on 27 July 2018. Laurienté returned to Rennes in January 2019.On 31 August 2022, Laurienté signed with Sassuolo in Italy.
CONTENT.Personal life: Born in France, Laurienté is of Guadeloupean descent.
CONTENT.External links: France profile at FFFArmand Laurienté – French league stats at LFP – also available in French (archived)Armand Laurienté at SoccerwayLorient profile
CONTENT.International career: Laurienté is a France youth international.

SUMMARY: Armand Gaëtan Laurienté (born 4 December 1998) is a French professional footballer who plays as a forward or left winger for Italian Serie B club Sassuolo.
